users.name: Sarah Jenkins
users.bio: With 15 years of trekking through the Andes and Alps, Sarah founded the company to share the secret spots the guidebooks missed.
users.fun_fact: Can pitch a tent in under 45 seconds—even in a gale.

users.name: Marcus Thorne
users.bio: Marcus doesn't just show you ruins; he brings the people who built them back to life through storytelling.
users.fun_fact: Speaks four languages fluently, and 'Ancient Greek' passably.

users.name: Elena Rodriguez
users.bio: The glue that holds your itinerary together. Elena ensures the only surprises you encounter are the pleasant ones.
users.fun_fact: Has a secret map of the best espresso bars in every major European city.

users.name: Leo 'The Chef' Kim
users.bio: Leo believes you can't understand a culture until you've tasted its spiciest dish. Prepare your palate.
